rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §45.0591, which governs charter district bond default payment procedures from the bond guarantee reserve fund and permanent school fund.
quote: the commissioner shall instruct the comptroller to transfer from the charter district bond guarantee reserve fund created under Section 45.0571 to the district's paying agent the amount necessary to pay the maturing or matured principal or interest.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns charter district bond default mechanics, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
